emails.theme: NEW: 4mm Ice Chain 14k Gold (Two Tone) + Signature & Kings Clasps
emails.shortDescription: New product launch. Two tone design creates the illusion of a diamond paved chain. Also feature Signature Clasps and Kings Clasps as an add-on.
emails.notes: First email of the month. Brand new product launch. Product page has strong imagery. Mention adding a signature clasp to your chain.
emails.creativeDirection: New launch. Two tone design, illusion of diamond paved chain. Feature the chain solo, then show pairing with Signature Clasp and Kings Clasp. Product page has strong imagery.

emails.theme: FATHER'S DAY GIFTING: Most Loved Gold Chains, USA Made
emails.product: 1.8mm, 3mm, 3.5mm, 4mm Diamond Cut Franco Chains (all USA Made, 14k Gold)
emails.shortDescription: USA Made messaging front and center. Four best selling gold chains crafted in the USA. Father's Day gifting. Superior quality, no import tariffs, better price.
emails.notes: Gold chains focus. Tie to Father's Day. Best sellers featured.
emails.creativeDirection: The gift he'll never take off. Father's Day gifting. Feature most loved USA made gold chains. Best sellers showcase.

emails.product: Chain Breaker Collection (Apex Wolf, Mortis Skull, Regis Lion, Koda Bear, Rajah Tiger)
emails.shortDescription: First time promoting this collection. 36+ diamonds per piece, gemstone eyes, VINCULA FRANGE on every reverse. 5 animals in silver and gold.
emails.notes: Collection spotlight. 10 products across silver and gold. Each pendant features gemstone or diamond eyes.
emails.creativeDirection: Bold animal spirits shattering their chains. Showcase all 5 animals. Silver and Gold. Each pendant features gemstone or diamond eyes and lab grown diamond borders (gold).

emails.theme: FATHER'S DAY: New Arrival, 18K USA Made Chains
emails.product: New 18K USA Made Diamond Cut Franco Chains (1.5mm, 2mm, 2.5mm, 3mm, 4mm)
emails.shortDescription: New arrival announcement. 18K gold chains now available in USA made. Just in time for Father's Day. Premium upgrade from 14K.
emails.notes: New arrival. 18K USA made chains launching just in time for Father's Day.
emails.creativeDirection: New arrival energy. 18K gold, USA made, just in time for Father's Day. Premium positioning. Upgrade from 14K.

emails.theme: FATHER'S DAY: For Every Kind of Dad
emails.shortDescription: Personality based gifting guide. The Adventure Dad (Voyager), The Bold Dad (Tiger/Lion/Chain Breaker), The Faith Dad (Champion/Redemption/Cross), The Legacy Dad (Memento Mori/Stoic).
emails.notes: Creative, fun angle. Different from standard product showcase. Should feel like a gift guide.
emails.creativeDirection: Personality based gifting. Adventure Dad = Voyager. Bold Dad = Tiger/Lion/Chain Breaker. Faith Dad = Champion/Cross. Legacy Dad = Memento Mori/Stoic. Each dad type gets 1 to 2 product picks.

emails.theme: FATHER'S DAY: Last Call Shipping Deadline + Most Loved Platinum
emails.product: Chains, Silver, Platinum pendants and chains
emails.shortDescription: June 15 is the LAST day to order chains, silver, and platinum for Father's Day delivery. Also feature most loved platinum pieces as the ultimate gift.
emails.notes: Shipping deadline urgency combined with platinum spotlight. Two angles in one email.
emails.creativeDirection: Shipping deadline urgency. Last day for chains, silver, platinum. Feature most loved platinum pieces (Champion, Voyager, Alpha Wolf, Carpe Diem, Empire). Platinum as the ultimate Father's Day investment.

emails.shortDescription: Post Father's Day pivot to summer. The pieces everyone's been wearing this summer. Feature best sellers and trending pieces. Fresh, seasonal energy.
emails.notes: Transition from Father's Day to summer messaging.
emails.creativeDirection: Summer pivot. Most loved styles. Best sellers and trending pieces. Fresh seasonal energy.

emails.product: Majesty Crown Ring, Reign Lion Ring, Dragon Ring, Skull Signet, Lux Diamond Band
emails.shortDescription: Dedicated rings email. Showcase the full range from statement rings to wedding bands. Mix of gold and platinum.
emails.notes: Rings have not been featured in a dedicated email recently.
emails.creativeDirection: Dedicated rings spotlight. Full range from statement rings to wedding bands. Gold and platinum.

emails.shortDescription: Dedicated spotlight on the Stoic 4 Virtues Pendant. Compass rose front, Marcus Aurelius quote on back. Available in silver, 14k gold, and platinum.
emails.notes: Product spotlight. Philosophical angle. Stoic wisdom meets wearable art.
emails.creativeDirection: Stoic 4 Virtues spotlight. Compass rose, Marcus Aurelius quote. Philosophical depth. Silver, gold, platinum. Product deep dive.

emails.product: Silver chains, silver pendants, silver rings
emails.shortDescription: Silver as accessible luxury for summer. Feature silver Franco chains, silver pendants (Voyager, Champion, Spartan, Memento Mori), silver rings (Majesty). Great entry point.
emails.notes: Silver focused. Broader appeal, lower price points. Promoting existing silver products, nothing new.
emails.creativeDirection: Silver as accessible luxury for summer. Chains, pendants, rings. Entry price points. Summer ready.
